sections.conclusion: Government Code Section 1090 is outside the purview of the Fair Political Practices Commission - the FPPC advises only on laws in the Political Reform Act (Government Code sections 81000-91014). The requester is directed to consult with their city attorney or the Attorney General's office.
sections.question_synthetic: Whether Government Code Section 1090 applies to a city council member's lease of property from the City of Taft.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declines to provide advice because Government Code Section 1090 falls outside its jurisdiction, which is limited to the Political Reform Act.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Declination letter with no formal Question or Conclusion sections; question and conclusion synthesized from letter content. File number W.10-020 suggests withdrawal or declination processing.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether Government Code Section 1090 applies to a city council member's lease of property from the City of Taft.

CONCLUSION: Government Code Section 1090 is outside the purview of the Fair Political Practices Commission - the FPPC advises only on laws in the Political Reform Act (Government Code sections 81000-91014). The requester is directed to consult with their city attorney or the Attorney General's office.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declines to provide written advice on Government Code Section 1090 as applied to a city council member's property lease, finding the matter outside its statutory purview.
